parsing_res_list.block_content:
Approximately 470English majors.

Roughly half to 2/3are dual majors in Education.

Roughly half of our majors enter as transfer students.
Our majors have had great success in a wide variety of careers and 
in graduate school.

Our majors score above state average on Praxis 2in subject matter 
Two recent graduates earned a perfect score on Praxis.
Three students have recently won Fulbright Awards,to South Korea 
(2007),Spain (2009),and South Africa (2010)

One 2010graduate earned a prestigious book contract for a 
memoir (Alice Ozma,The Reading Promise)

See our Department Website (prospective student link)for 
information on careers for English Majors.

core_content.markdown:
## Facts about our students 

Approximately 470English majors.

Roughly half to 2/3are dual majors in Education.

Roughly half of our majors enter as transfer students.

Our majors have had great success in a wide variety of careers and 

in graduate school.

Our majors score above state average on Praxis 2in subject matter 

Two recent graduates earned a perfect score on Praxis.

Three students have recently won Fulbright Awards,to South Korea 

(2007),Spain (2009),and South Africa (2010)

One 2010graduate earned a prestigious book contract for a 

memoir (Alice Ozma,The Reading Promise)

See our Department Website (prospective student link)for 

information on careers for English Majors.
